item.title: Roguelike 2D platformer Pit Panic announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Flying Rat Studio has announced roguelike 2D platformer Pit Panic for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, GOG). It will launch in July.

Here is an overview of the game, via Flying Rat Studio:

About

Pit Panic is a challenging roguelike 2D platformer with fast pace, unique gameplay, and environmental puzzles.

Take on the role of a curious archeologist and race through handcrafted levels, take down ancient bosses and jump up like your pants are on fire.

Key Features

  • Get Hooked! – Wield the mysterious hook—a powerful omnitool—that digs through blocks, swings you around, and unlocks hidden treasures. Master physics-driven movement to avoid deadly traps and blast through interactive blocks. Turn sand into glass, jelly into fire, and bridges into weapons, if necessary.
  • Think Fast, Run Faster – You will have to dig deep to return to the surface. There are many ways to die, but only one way to survive: up. Get in the flow, make split-second decisions, and even sacrifice your health for power-ups to escape the crumbling Aztec temple.
  • Every Run is Different – Discover four distinct biomes, each with unique puzzles, enemies, and art styles. Over 1,000 unique handcrafted levels mix things up every time you play. Or build your own levels to put fellow adventurers to the ultimate test.
  • Challenge Other Players – The real fun starts after you climb out of the pit. Compare your skills with other players, beat their best times, and complete unique daily challenges to receive precious rewards.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer
